## 🟠 Strategy (MSTR)

- **Price:** $165.54 (May 21) — down **-13.9% this week**, up +6.5% month-to-date
- **TD Cowen** raised price target to **$400** (from $395), reiterating Buy — implies 143% upside; firm targets Bitcoin at $140K by year-end *(TipRanks)*
- **Analyst consensus:** 14 Buy / 1 Hold / 0 Sell — median target **$322.50**, max $705 *(MarketBeat)*
- **Latest move:** Shares fell 6%+ after Strategy deployed ~$2.01B to purchase more Bitcoin *(Yahoo Finance)*
- **Year-end 2026 proxy:** Tied to Bitcoin trajectory; if BTC hits $140K, MSTR could reach $400+ per analyst models

---

## ₿ Bitcoin

- **Price (May 21):** ~$77,262 — markets anticipate $76K–$78K range today *(Polymarket: 60% probability)*
- **ETF Flows:** US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw **$635M in net outflows** on May 13 — largest single-day withdrawal since late January *(Fortune)*
- **Retail vs. Institutional:** Retail heavily short/fearful; institutional buyers continue deploying capital into spot products — stark bifurcation *(CoinStats)*
- **Wallet count:** Bitcoin holders declining at **fastest rate in nearly 2 years** — 245K wallets exited in 5 days, suggesting retail profit-taking *(multiple sources)*

---

## 🤖 Tech & AI

- **Anthropic × KPMG:** Global alliance — all **276,000+ KPMG employees** gain Claude access; embedded in Digital Gateway for tax & legal clients *(Anthropic)*
- **Claude for Small Business:** Anthropic launched Claude integrations into QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, Google Workspace, and Microsoft 365 — handles payroll, invoicing, sales, and month-end close *(PYMNTS)*
- **Anthropic London:** First European developer gathering; Anthropic, OpenAI, and Jeff Bezos's Project Prometheus all building major UK presence *(Fortune)*
- **Claude Mythos:** Anthropic's security-focused model reportedly finds software vulnerabilities **beyond many human experts** *(Anthropic)*
- **Claude Opus 4.7 Fast Mode:** Research preview launched — significantly faster output token generation *(Releasebot)*

---

## 🔬 Health & Science

- **Anti-Aging Wound Healing:** Topical drug **ABT-263** dramatically improves wound healing in older skin — major implications for elderly care *(ScienceDaily)*
- **Mitochondria Boost:** Leucine (found in protein-rich foods) shown to protect energy-producing proteins inside cells — supercharging mitochondrial function *(SciTechDaily)*
- **Gut Repair:** MIT scientists identify **cysteine** (found in meat, dairy, beans, nuts) as a potent trigger for intestinal repair *(MIT/SciTechDaily)*
- **Bone Health:** New research shows tea and coffee may affect aging bones differently — caffeine source matters *(Live Science)*
- **Pregnancy Research:** Major international study uncovers new genetic clues tied to hyperemesis gravidarum (severe morning sickness) *(Nature)*

---

## 💹 Finance & Markets

- **S&P 500:** +0.2% | **Nasdaq:** +0.1% | **Dow Jones:** +0.6% — Dow clinches record high on US-Iran peace hopes *(Yahoo Finance)*
- **Geopolitics:** Sec. State Rubio reports "good signs" toward Iran deal; Brent crude ~$104/bbl, WTI just under $100 *(Reuters)*
- **Nvidia:** Earnings beat on top and bottom lines ✅ *(CNBC)*
- **Walmart:** Revenue and EPS above estimates ✅ *(Yahoo Finance)*
- **Intuit:** Plunged **-21%** after earnings miss — AI disruption fears cited *(Yahoo Finance)*
- **Jobless Claims:** Rose to 209K (week ended May 16) — slightly above 210K consensus, modest labor market softness *(Reuters)*
